content.text:
Done. Here is a summary of what was implemented:

## Changes Made

### 1. `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\components\campaign-form.tsx`

- Added import for shadcn/ui `Select`, `SelectContent`, `SelectItem`, `SelectTrigger`, `SelectValue` components
- Defined a `Segment` type union: `'all' | 'new' | 'inactive' | 'vip'`
- Created `SEGMENT_LABELS` map for dropdown display text (e.g., "New Clients (joined < 30 days)")
- Created `SEGMENT_BUTTON_LABELS` map for dynamic button text (e.g., "Send to New Clients")
- Added `segment` state initialized to `'all'`
- Added a "Target Segment" dropdown between the message textarea and the submit button
- The `target_segment` field in the campaign insert now uses the selected `segment` value instead of hardcoded `'all'`
- The submit button text dynamically changes based on the selected segment
- Segment resets to `'all'` after successful send

### 2. `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\supabase\functions\send-push\index.ts`

- Updated the Supabase select query to also fetch `created_at`, `last_activity`, and `tier` from `customer_cards`
- Added segment filtering logic after fetching cards:
  - **`all`**: no filter (all cards pass)
  - **`new`**: only cards where `created_at` is within the last 30 days
  - **`inactive`**: only cards where `last_activity` is older than 14 days (or null, meaning never active)
  - **`vip`**: only cards where `tier` is `'gold'` or `'vip'` (case-insensitive)
- Both token extraction and notification creation now operate on the filtered card set (`filteredCards`) instead of the unfiltered `cards`

### Commit

- **Hash:** `f8641ce`
- **Message:** `feat: add customer segmentation to campaigns`
